sentences.english: Despite living in an era of unprecedented connectivity, research shows that rates of loneliness have reached epidemic levels in many developed nations.
sentences.korean: 전례 없는 연결의 시대에 살고 있음에도 연구에 따르면 외로움 비율이 많은 선진국에서 전염병 수준에 도달했다.

sentences.english: A comprehensive study found that chronic loneliness is as damaging to health as smoking fifteen cigarettes a day, increasing the risk of heart disease and dementia by up to fifty percent.
Social media appears to exacerbate the problem, creating an illusion of connection while often leaving users feeling more isolated than before.
sentences.korean: / 연결의 환상을 만들면서 / 종종 사용자를 / 이전보다 더 고립되게 느끼게 하면서.

sentences.english: Some governments have begun to treat loneliness as a public health crisis, with Japan and the UK both appointing official ministers of loneliness to coordinate national responses.
sentences.korean: / 일본과 영국 모두 / 국가 대응을 조율하기 위해 / 외로움 담당 장관을 임명하면서.
